ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the match */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions during the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was held */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., club, national) */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the match */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists provided by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event during the match */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event on the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the league operates in */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the match */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties issued during the match */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in the match */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
